name: polymarket
description: Polymarket exchange reference for Polygon prediction markets. Covers CTF-based binary + multi-outcome (negative-risk) markets, pUSD collateral, L1/L2 authentication, the relayer-v2 architecture, UMA optimistic-oracle resolution with 2h challenge window, per-market fee schedules, and the token_id / condition_id / question_id / slug identifier ladder. Ships companion files apis.md (Gamma / CLOB / Data / Relayer endpoint reference — Context7-grounded against docs.polymarket.com), strategies.md (per-category trading playbooks), and exploits.md (structural edge ledger). Exchange-specific companion to the trader skill.
